case_title: ERIC J HURTADO VS. KEVIN LUM

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HURTADO, ERIC J AS TO DEFENDANT LUM, KEVIN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WINDOWS ARE US JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
